MERMAID:TIMELINE

timeline title Python Learning Roadmap - 2025 section Q1 - Foundation January : Python Setup, Syntax, Variables, Data Types : Control Flow - if, for, while February : Functions, Modules, File I/O : Error Handling March : Data Structures - Lists, Tuples, Dicts, Sets : Comprehensions, Lambda Functions section Q2 - Intermediate & OOP April : Object-Oriented Programming - Classes, Objects : Inheritance, Encapsulation, Polymorphism May : Virtual Environments, pip, Python Packages : Working with JSON, APIs, CSV, Web Scraping (requests, BeautifulSoup) June : Unit Testing, Logging, Debugging section Q3 - Web Dev & Automation July : Flask Basics, REST APIs : Jinja2 Templates, URL Routing August : Automation with Python - Selenium, pyautogui : Scheduling with cron, APScheduler September : SQLite & SQLAlchemy : Intro to Django (Optional) section Q4 - Data Science & Final Projects October : NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn : Data Cleaning, EDA November : scikit-learn Basics, ML Algorithms : Final Projects - Choose Domain (e.g., Web, Data) December : Interview Prep : Build Portfolio, GitHub Cleanup

timeline title History of Social Media Platform 2002 : LinkedIn 2004 : Facebook : Google 2005 : YouTube 2006 : Twitter
